settings.html:
<script>
// Dual Countdown Timers
const PRESENCIAL_TARGET = new Date('2026-05-20T19:00:00-04:00');
const VIRTUAL_TARGET = new Date('2026-05-26T19:00:00-04:00');

function padZero(n) { return n.toString().padStart(2, '0'); }

function updateDualCountdowns() {
  const now = new Date();

  // Presencial
  let diffP = Math.max(0, PRESENCIAL_TARGET - now);
  const pD = Math.floor(diffP / 86400000); diffP %= 86400000;
  const pH = Math.floor(diffP / 3600000); diffP %= 3600000;
  const pM = Math.floor(diffP / 60000); diffP %= 60000;
  const pS = Math.floor(diffP / 1000);

  ['p-dias','p-hrs','p-min','p-seg'].forEach((id, i) => {
    const el = document.getElementById(id);
    const elm = document.getElementById(id + '-m');
    const vals = [pD, pH, pM, pS];
    const txt = padZero(vals[i]);
    if (el) el.textContent = txt;
    if (elm) elm.textContent = txt;
  });

  // Virtual
  let diffV = Math.max(0, VIRTUAL_TARGET - now);
  const vD = Math.floor(diffV / 86400000); diffV %= 86400000;
  const vH = Math.floor(diffV / 3600000); diffV %= 3600000;
  const vM = Math.floor(diffV / 60000); diffV %= 60000;
  const vS = Math.floor(diffV / 1000);

  ['v-dias','v-hrs','v-min','v-seg'].forEach((id, i) => {
    const el = document.getElementById(id);
    const elm = document.getElementById(id + '-m');
    const vals = [vD, vH, vM, vS];
    const txt = padZero(vals[i]);
    if (el) el.textContent = txt;
    if (elm) elm.textContent = txt;
  });
}

// FAQ Accordion
function toggleFaq(btn) {
  const item = btn.parentElement;
  const wasOpen = item.classList.contains('open');
  document.querySelectorAll('.faq-item').forEach(i => i.classList.remove('open'));
  if (!wasOpen) item.classList.add('open');
}

// Header scroll effect
window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
  document.getElementById('header').classList.toggle('scrolled', window.scrollY > 50);
});

// Scroll animations
const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
  entries.forEach(e => {
    if (e.isIntersecting) {
      e.target.style.opacity = '1';
      e.target.style.transform = 'translateY(0)';
    }
  });
}, { threshold: 0.1 });

document.querySelectorAll('.card, .step, .benefit-item, .date-card, .tl-item, .criteria-block, .legal-card').forEach(el => {
  el.style.opacity = '0';
  el.style.transform = 'translateY(20px)';
  el.style.transition = 'opacity 0.5s ease, transform 0.5s ease';
  observer.observe(el);
});

// Start countdowns
updateDualCountdowns();
setInterval(updateDualCountdowns, 1000);
</script>
</body>
</html>
